dropped_summary: Both frames appear to be introductory visuals or title cards rather than teaching artifacts. Frame 0001 shows a static landscape with no discernible educational content, and frame 0002 displays a stylized title screen with a Chinese title '末日之旅' (Journey to the End of the World), which is likely an intro or thematic image, not a teaching artifact. No slides, diagrams, formulas, or clear educational material are present, so all frames are dropped per criteria 4.
